segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval stone tavern interior with Gothic architectural elements including tall arched windows and massive stone pillars. Several NPCs are seated at wooden round tables throughout the space, eating and conversing under the dim light of wall-mounted torches. The camera remains fixed, capturing the ambient atmosphere of the dimly lit hall with no significant movement or changes occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, unchanging gaze upon the interior of a medieval stone tavern characterized by its somber Gothic atmosphere. It begins with a fixed view of the hall, where massive stone pillars and tall arched windows define the architectural space. As the camera lingers, the focus remains on several NPCs seated at round wooden tables, eating and conversing in the dim light. The scene persists in this state of stillness, with the flickering glow of wall-mounted torches providing the only movement within the ambient gloom. Finally, the shot concludes without shifting its perspective, preserving the quiet, static mood of the guild hall.
